queries.question: Show the interest rates of all the IPOs, and combine them with all the secondary offering interest rates where 50M capital has been raised.
queries.sql:
SELECT Loans.InterestRate 
FROM Loans
WHERE Loans.StockMarketOfferings = "IPO" OR Loans.StockMarketOfferings = "Secondary Offering" AND Loans.RaisedCapitalAmount = "50000000"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?interestrate WHERE {
  ?loans a :Loans .
  ?loans p:InterestRate ?interestrate .
  ?loans p:StockMarketOfferings ?stockmarketofferings_w .
  ?loans p:StockMarketOfferings ?stockmarketofferings_w2 .
  ?loans p:RaisedCapitalAmount ?raisedcapitalamount_w .
  FILTER((STR(?stockmarketofferings_w) = "IPO" || (STR(?stockmarketofferings_w2) = "Secondary Offering" && (STR(?raisedcapitalamount_w) = "50000000" || STR(?raisedcapitalamount_w) = "50000000.0"))))
}

queries.question: Give me all the IPO rates and secondary offering rates with 50M of raised capital.
queries.sql:
SELECT Loans.InterestRate 
FROM Loans
WHERE (Loans.StockMarketOfferings = "IPO" OR Loans.StockMarketOfferings = "Secondary Offering") AND Loans.RaisedCapitalAmount = "50000000"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?interestrate WHERE {
  ?loans a :Loans .
  ?loans p:InterestRate ?interestrate .
  ?loans p:StockMarketOfferings ?stockmarketofferings_w .
  ?loans p:StockMarketOfferings ?stockmarketofferings_w2 .
  ?loans p:RaisedCapitalAmount ?raisedcapitalamount_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?stockmarketofferings_w) = "IPO" || STR(?stockmarketofferings_w2) = "Secondary Offering")) && (STR(?raisedcapitalamount_w) = "50000000" || STR(?raisedcapitalamount_w) = "50000000.0")))
}
